title: Rapid mapping for emergency-response UAV missions
summary: Post-event satellite mapping gives drone teams current hazard and access maps for safe deployment.
description:
After floods, wildfires or earthquakes, UAV teams supporting search and rescue need up-to-date maps of access, hazards and safe takeoff/landing sites. Pre-event maps quickly become obsolete and ground reconnaissance is slow and dangerous.

CEMS Rapid Mapping delivers satellite-derived flood extent, fire perimeter and damage-grading products within hours of activation, drawing on Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 optical imagery. These give drone coordinators current situational awareness to plan safe, effective missions.

site.integration_detail: CEMS Rapid Mapping delivers finished flood-extent, fire-perimeter and damage-grading products that responders use directly. Sentinel imagery underpins them, but no user-side processing is required.
